tyche_room_back: Exact faithful recreation of the attached Tyche temple interior reference at high resolution 1536x960 pixels. Isometric 2.5D trading hall: central Tyche statue alcove with TYCHE'S TEMPLE sign, green ticker tape across top wall, MARKETS and PORTFOLIO wall boards, three wooden trading desks with monitors, circular stone dais with blue rug, teal and gold palette, warm candlelight. Full room EXCLUDING the bottom foreground ledger table, amphora, and ivy railing — cut those off at bottom edge. No characters, no game UI. Single cohesive image, sharp painterly pixel art.
tyche_room_fore: Isolated bottom foreground strip ONLY on flat solid magenta #FF00FF: stone balcony railing with ivy vines and golden amphora vase. NO desk, NO chair, NO monitors. Same isometric 2.5D camera as reference. Rest pure magenta. Sharp painterly pixel art.
